summary: C-3 Finance Route Modular Delegation verification complete. All 32 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend smoke tests confirm admin finance overview, ledger, subscriptions pages and account invoices, subscription pages all working correctly. Route delegation successful with 0 duplicate routes.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All admin and account finance pages accessible and functional)

context_for_next_testing_agent: C-3 finance route modular delegation verified. Finance routes delegated from api_router to dedicated modules: payments_routes.py (9 routes), webhook_routes.py (4 routes), invoice_routes.py (16 routes), subscription_routes.py (8 routes), ledger_routes.py (3 routes), admin_finance_routes.py (13 routes). Total: 53 finance routes. All routes accessible at same paths with identical API contract. No duplicate routes detected. Ledger entries show proper double-entry bookkeeping (debit==credit).
